case_title: HAU'S JADE AND JEWELRY CO. VS NEW YORK JEWELRY & GIFT INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAU'S JADE AND JEWELRY CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEW YORK JEWELRY & GIFT INC.
